parameters.content:
Create Generic Credential
Type: Query Auth
Name: token
Your Browserless API Key

allowedDomains
Only crawl URLs from specified root domains.
https://ready.gov/
→ ready.gov, fema.gov,

allowedSubdomains
Only crawl specific subdomains (instead of all).
https://nasa.gov/
→ science.nasa.gov, nasa.gov,

blockedSubdomains
Crawl all subdomains except those listed.
https://nasa.gov/
→ plus.nasa.gov

allowedSections
Only crawl URLs containing specified path segments.
https://nps.gov/subjects/fossils/
→ fossils, articles

blockedSections
Crawl all sections except those containing specified path segments.
https://ready.gov/
→ ar,es,fr,ht,ja,ko,ru,tl,vi,zh-hans,hi,pt-br,

dataTypes
Regex filter for allowed file types.
e.g., allow: HTML, PDF (customizable)

## Crawl
Crawls the specified URL and extracts all links found on the page. Each extracted URL is validated and crawled in subsequent runs.
There are multiple filters available in the Sets Inputs node to help refine what data is collected during a run.
